All over theParisOlympics, it was a stream of memorable moments. On water, and on land. On all kinds of fields.

Novak Djokovicbeat Rafael Nadal in perhaps the final meeting of the longtime tennis rivals, and Japan surged pastChinato win gold in the men’s gymnastics competition. Summer McIntosh claimed her first gold medal with a dominating victory in the 400-meter individual medley on Monday night.

___

Follow AP visual journalism: AP Images Blog, Instagram, Twitter

title: AP PHOTOS: Another day of memorable moments at the Paris Olympics. Here's a look at Day 3 | The Independent
